data.content: Plan review rejected. The revised plan still has three blocking gaps: it assumes `_read_existing_settings()` only needs to parse the shell writer's TOML shape even though the repo also writes `settings.toml` via `smol-toml`; it does not explicitly remove the `REGISTERED_AGENTS=()` resets in either setup path; and it does not make dispatch editing additive because existing action mappings and pool entries are still rebuilt from fresh prompts instead of being shown and kept by default. Replan with explicit changes for those code paths and add interactive verification for default-preserving behavior.
